@startuml
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
autonumber "<b>[0]"

box "Master" #LightGray
    participant Client
    participant Dispatcher
    database Database
    participant RSyncServer
    participant Arbiter
end box

box "Worker" #LightGrey
    participant Worker
end box


Client ->> Database : Create a taskset\nEnqueue tasks
activate Database
deactivate Database

== Taskset request ==
Dispatcher->>+Database:Taskset dispatch 
note right of  Database:#1;Log the worker participation#2;RSync 

alt setup failed
    
   note over RSycn,Rsyncserver:Setup
   
   
else [setup succeeded]
    
     activate Worker
     
     
      alt retry needed
      
         deactivate Worker
        
         
        else[no more retries ] 
        
         
            
            end 
            
            



Testing 


Slave -->+ Slave:Spawn slaves  
slave-->- slave:slaveset up  

Dequeue a task \Return atask\Add atrial  


Executeat ask 



Queryth etrialresult Respondtothequery Marktaskasfinished Enqueuethe tas kMarktas kasfailed Dequeeuatas knotasksleft CheckrequestCheckwhetheralltasksare finished[sometaksarel eft]E nqeuethetas ksM arktasetkasf inishedNotifyt hetasketismarkedafinished Killsla ves Addsavelogs Querythestatusoft he tase ktRespon dto th e query




@enduml
